raw_sql:
SELECT 
    category,
    COUNT(*) AS total_incidents,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600) AS avg_hours_to_resolve,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600) AS median_hours,
    MIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600) AS min_hours,
    MAX(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600) AS max_hours
FROM flag_5
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY avg_hours_to_resolve DESC;
template:
SELECT 
    category,

    MIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n) AS min_hours,
    MAX(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n) AS max_hours
FROM flag_5
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY avg_hours_to_resolve DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    EXTRACT(DOW FROM opened_at) AS day_of_week,
    TO_CHAR(opened_at, 'Day') AS day_name,
    COUNT(*) AS incidents,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600) AS avg_hours
FROM flag_5
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
    AND category = 'Hardware'
GROUP BY day_of_week, day_name
ORDER BY avg_hours DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN short_description ILIKE '%printer%' THEN 'Printer'
        WHEN short_description ILIKE '%monitor%' OR short_description ILIKE '%display%' OR short_description ILIKE '%screen%' THEN 'Monitor/Display'
        WHEN short_description ILIKE '%keyboard%' OR short_description ILIKE '%mouse%' THEN 'Keyboard/Mouse'
        WHEN short_description ILIKE '%server%' THEN 'Server'
        WHEN short_description ILIKE '%desktop%' OR short_description ILIKE '%pc%' OR short_description ILIKE '%computer%' THEN 'Desktop/PC'
        WHEN short_description ILIKE '%laptop%' OR short_description ILIKE '%notebook%' THEN 'Laptop'
        ELSE 'Other'
    END AS device_type,
    COUNT(*) AS incidents,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600) AS avg_hours,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600) AS median_hours,
    MIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600) AS min_hours,
    MAX(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600) AS max_hours
FROM flag_5
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
    AND category = 'Hardware'
GROUP BY device_type
ORDER BY avg_hours DESC;
template:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN short_description ILIKE ?s THEN ?s
        WHEN short_description ILIKE ?s OR short_description ILIKE ?s OR short_description ILIKE ?s THEN ?s
        WHEN short_description ILIKE ?s OR short_description ILIKE ?s THEN ?s
        WHEN short_description ILIKE ?s THEN ?s
        WHEN short_description ILIKE ?s OR short_description ILIKE ?s OR short_description ILIKE ?s THEN ?s
        WHEN short_description ILIKE ?s OR short_description ILIKE ?s THEN ?s
        ELSE ?s
    END AS device_type,
    COUNT(*) AS incidents,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n) AS avg_hours,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(?n) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n) AS median_hours,
    MIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n) AS min_hours,
    MAX(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n) AS max_hours
FROM flag_5
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
    AND category = ?s
GROUP BY device_type
ORDER BY avg_hours DESC;

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN (short_description ~~* '%printer%'::text) THEN 'Printer'::text WHEN ((short_description ~~* '%monitor%'::text) OR (short_description ~~* '%display%'::text) OR (short_description ~~* '%screen%'::text)) THEN 'Monitor/Display'::text WHEN ((short_description ~~* '%keyboard%'::text) OR (short_description ~~* '%mouse%'::text)) THEN 'Keyboard/Mouse'::text WHEN (short_description ~~* '%server%'::text) THEN 'Server'::text WHEN ((short_description ~~* '%desktop%'::text) OR (short_description ~~* '%pc%'::text) OR (short_description ~~* '%computer%'::text)) THEN 'Desktop/PC'::text WHEN ((short_description ~~* '%laptop%'::text) OR (short_description ~~* '%notebook%'::text)) THEN 'Laptop'::text ELSE 'Other'::text END)

predicates: ((closed_at IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL) AND (category = 'Hardware'::text))

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS incidents,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600) AS avg_hours,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600) AS median_hours
FROM flag_5
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
    AND category = 'Hardware'
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month;
template:

FROM flag_5
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    category,
    CORR(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM opened_at), EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600) AS corr_month_vs_hours,
    COUNT(*) AS total_incidents,
    MIN(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600)) OVER (PARTITION BY category) AS note_min_monthly_avg,
    MAX(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600)) OVER (PARTITION BY category) AS note_max_monthly_avg
FROM flag_5
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM opened_at) = 2023
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY corr_month_vs_hours DESC;
template:
SELECT 
    category,
    CORR(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM opened_at), EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n) AS corr_month_vs_hours,
    COUNT(*) AS total_incidents,
    MIN(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n)) OVER (PARTITION BY category) AS note_min_monthly_avg,
    MAX(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n)) OVER (PARTITION BY category) AS note_max_monthly_avg
FROM flag_5
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM opened_at) = ?n
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY corr_month_vs_hours DESC;

predicates: ((closed_at IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL) AND (EXTRACT(year FROM opened_at) = '2023'::numeric))

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS opened,
    SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)) AS cumulative_opened,
    COUNT(closed_at) AS closed_same_month,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600) AS avg_resolution_hours
FROM flag_5
WHERE category = 'Hardware'
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM opened_at) = 2023
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)
ORDER BY month;
template:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS opened,
    SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)) AS cumulative_opened,
    COUNT(closed_at) AS closed_same_month,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n) AS avg_resolution_hours
FROM flag_5
WHERE category = ?s
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM opened_at) = ?n
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)
ORDER BY month;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    number,
    opened_at,
    closed_at,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600 AS hours_to_resolve,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600 / 2.4 AS divided_by_2_4
FROM flag_5
WHERE category = 'Hardware'
    AND closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY opened_at
LIMIT 30;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600 / 2.4 AS sequence_number,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600 AS hours,
    MOD(CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600 * 10 AS BIGINT), 24) AS remainder_check
FROM flag_5
WHERE category = 'Hardware'
    AND closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY opened_at;
template:
SELECT 
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n / ?n AS sequence_number,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n AS hours,
    MOD(CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n * ?n AS BIGINT), ?n) AS remainder_check
FROM flag_5
WHERE category = ?s
    AND closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY opened_at;

predicates: ((closed_at IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL) AND (category = 'Hardware'::text))

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    category,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN MOD(CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) AS BIGINT), 8640) = 0 THEN 1 END) AS exact_2_4h_multiples,
    ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN MOD(CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) AS BIGINT), 8640) = 0 THEN 1 END)::numeric / COUNT(*) * 100, 1) AS pct_exact_multiples
FROM flag_5
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
    AND closed_at > opened_at
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY pct_exact_multiples DESC;
template:
SELECT 
    category,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN MOD(CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) AS BIGINT), ?n) = ?n THEN ?n END) AS exact_2_4h_multiples,
    ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN MOD(CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) AS BIGINT), ?n) = ?n THEN ?n END)::numeric / COUNT(*) * ?n, ?n) AS pct_exact_multiples
FROM flag_5
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
    AND closed_at > opened_at
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY pct_exact_multiples DESC;

predicates: ((closed_at IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL) AND (closed_at > opened_at))

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600 / 2.4 AS INTEGER) AS seq_num,
    number,
    opened_at::date AS opened_date
FROM flag_5
WHERE category = 'Hardware'
    AND closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
    AND closed_at > opened_at
ORDER BY seq_num;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUBSTRING(number FROM 4) AS INTEGER) AS inc_num,
    CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600 / 2.4 AS INTEGER) AS seq_num,
    CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600 / 2.4 AS INTEGER) - CAST(SUBSTRING(number FROM 4) AS INTEGER) AS difference,
    opened_at::date,
    assigned_to
FROM flag_5
WHERE category = 'Hardware'
    AND closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
    AND closed_at > opened_at
ORDER BY inc_num;
template:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUBSTRING(number FROM ?n) AS INTEGER) AS inc_num,
    CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n / ?n AS INTEGER) AS seq_num,
    CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n / ?n AS INTEGER) - CAST(SUBSTRING(number FROM ?n) AS INTEGER) AS difference,
    opened_at::date,
    assigned_to
FROM flag_5
WHERE category = ?s
    AND closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
    AND closed_at > opened_at
ORDER BY inc_num;

predicates: ((closed_at IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL) AND (closed_at > opened_at) AND (category = 'Hardware'::text))
